info.title: OpenList API
info.description: OpenList (AList fork) file management API. All JSON API endpoints return a standard wrapper: {code, message, data}.

raw_url.description: Direct download URL from storage provider

archive_pass.description: Password for the archive file itself

password.description: Plain text for /login, SHA256 hash for /login/hash

post.summary: Get direct upload info for client-side upload
